'''Kriyystak''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who was the best tracker in [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca's]] family. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] met Kriyystak during his first visit to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
